mapper.update: update batch.file_channel_health set next_probe_at = #{newNextProbeAt}, updated_at = excluded.updated_at where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and channel_code = #{channelCode} and (next_probe_at is null or next_probe_at <= #{now}) and health_status <> 'HEALTHY'
mapper.insert: insert into batch.file_channel_health ( tenant_id, channel_code, channel_type, health_status, consecutive_failures, last_probe_at, last_success_at, last_failure_at, next_probe_at, probe_message, probe_evidence, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{channelCode}, #{channelType}, 'HEALTHY', 0, #{now}, #{now}, null, #{nextProbeAt}, #{probeMessage}, #{probeEvidence}, current_timestamp ) on conflict (tenant_id, channel_code) do update set channel_type = excluded.channel_type, health_status = 'HEALTHY', consecutive_failures = 0, last_probe_at = excluded.last_probe_at, last_success_at = excluded.last_success_at, next_probe_at = excluded.next_probe_at, probe_message = excluded.probe_message, probe_evidence = excluded.probe_evidence, updated_at = excluded.updated_at

insert into batch.file_channel_health ( tenant_id, channel_code, channel_type, health_status, consecutive_failures, last_probe_at, last_success_at, last_failure_at, next_probe_at, probe_message, probe_evidence, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{channelCode}, #{channelType}, case when 1 >= #{failureThreshold} then 'UNHEALTHY' else 'DEGRADED' end, 1, #{now}, null, #{now}, #{firstFailureBackoffAt}, #{probeMessage}, #{probeEvidence}, current_timestamp ) on conflict (tenant_id, channel_code) do update set channel_type = excluded.channel_type, consecutive_failures = coalesce(batch.file_channel_health.consecutive_failures, 0) + 1, health_status = case when coalesce(batch.file_channel_health.consecutive_failures, 0) + 1 >= #{failureThreshold} then 'UNHEALTHY' else 'DEGRADED' end, last_probe_at = excluded.last_probe_at, last_failure_at = excluded.last_failure_at, next_probe_at = batch.file_channel_health.next_probe_at, -- 先占位，后面再按新 count 更新 probe_message = excluded.probe_message, probe_evidence = excluded.probe_evidence, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.update: update batch.file_channel_health set next_probe_at = #{now}::timestamptz + least( make_interval(secs => #{maxBackoffMillis} / 1000.0), make_interval( secs => #{probeIntervalMillis} / 1000.0 * power(2, least(greatest(consecutive_failures - 1, 0), 30)))) where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and channel_code = #{channelCode}
mapper.select: select count(*) from batch.file_channel_health where health_status = 'UNHEALTHY' and next_probe_at is not null and next_probe_at <= #{now}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.file_channel_health ( tenant_id, channel_code, channel_type, health_status, consecutive_failures, last_probe_at, last_success_at, last_failure_at, next_probe_at, probe_message, probe_evidence, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{channelCode}, #{channelType}, #{healthStatus}, #{consecutiveFailures}, #{lastProbeAt}, #{lastSuccessAt}, #{lastFailureAt}, #{nextProbeAt}, #{probeMessage}, #{probeEvidence}, current_timestamp ) on conflict (tenant_id, channel_code) do update set channel_type = excluded.channel_type, health_status = excluded.health_status, consecutive_failures = excluded.consecutive_failures, last_probe_at = excluded.last_probe_at, last_success_at = excluded.last_success_at, last_failure_at = excluded.last_failure_at, next_probe_at = excluded.next_probe_at, probe_message = excluded.probe_message, probe_evidence = excluded.probe_evidence, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
